title: Handheld Bidet Sprayer Kit, Stainless Steel Shattaf Douche Muslim Shower Spray with Hose Bidet Holder Valve for Toilet Cleaning, Pet Bath, Personal Hygiene (includes T-adapter)
features: Quality Material - This bidet sprayer set is made of 304 Stainless Steel for higher quality and durability. You don’t need to worry about scratch, corrosion, leaking.

Easy Installation - You will spend about 10 minutes to install this toilet handheld bidet shower kit without plumping help. Easy to use and clean, this modern douche shower spray is always conveniently ready for you, whenever you need to cleanse!

Easy Hygienic Douche Solution - This cleaning bidet sprayer kit is a great ideal for personal hygiene, pet shower, muslim shower or baby cloth washing, especial for expectant mother. No matter if you need haemorrhoid prevention or intimate cleansing solutions, this premium douching kit has you covered.

Water-saving Bubbler & Ceramic Valves –The filter bubbler of handheld bidet sprayer has water-saving effect while making the water flow smoother. Thickened durable ceramic valves ensure a smooth and long-lasting operation of the handles while ensuring that there are no water leaks and no drip in connections. Water pressure can be controlled by the T-valve adapter and to can accommodate for everyone's needs.

Package Includes - A whole handheld toilet bidet sprayer set is included Handheld Bidet, Shut off Valve, Stainless Steel Supply Hose, Expanding nut, Screw, Bidet Holder, Screw (use to fix the bidet holder on wall or on Bidet holder plate), Bidet Holder plate

KINDLY REMIND Turn off T-Valve Adapter lever after each use to close the water supply to the Diaper Sprayer Head. If you choose to not turn off the valve lever, you risk weakening the internal components of the sprayer and hose, or exposing your home to water damage or flooding.
